games.name: Gravity Climb Girl
games.description: Gravity Climb Girl is a thrilling vertical adventure where gravity is your greatest challenge! Join a fearless girl on her mission to defy the laws of physics as she scales walls, leaps between platforms, and avoids deadly traps in a futuristic world. Welcome to Tung Tung Sahur: Midnight Terror &amp;mdash; a bizarre horror-comedy survival game where instant noodles may be your only ticket to freedom. You play as an unsuspecting villager trapped inside an abandoned, crumbling house &amp;mdash; one that&amp;rsquo;s home to mysterious forces. Your mission? Collect 10 packs of instant noodles scattered throughout the haunted property before the break of dawn. Only then can you unlock the exit and make your escape. But beware... youre not alone. Roaming

games.description: Basketball School is the basketball arcade game in which you must try to score baskets in all the different game modes available. You can play either arcade, time attack, and distance mode. Arcade mode gives you 10 balls to use; you must continue to score baskets although it becomes harder each time you score. Time attack mode requires you to score as many baskets within the time limit as possible; you have unlimited balls but limited time. Distance mode allows you to increase the distance of your shot each time that you score.
